component.name: WiFi Checker
component.summary: WiFi signal strength analyzer and floor plan mapper

description.p: WiFi Checker lets you map WiFi signal strength across floors of a building. Draw floor plans, take measurements at different locations, and visualize signal quality with interactive heatmaps. Supports throughput testing via iperf3 and SMB share testing.
Added About page to settings, CI/CD pipeline, Flatpak packaging, README, and MIT license.
Added MByte/s vs Mbit/s throughput unit setting.
